title: cylindropuntia molesta subsp. molesta
intro: Cylindropuntia molesta subsp. molesta, also known as the teddy bear cholla, is a species of cholla cactus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and combat microbial infections. The health benefits of Cylindropuntia molesta subsp. molesta include its potential to lower blood pressure, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and salves, can be made by drying and processing the stems, which are then used to treat various health conditions.
